wine_bars_late.name: Prova Wine Food and Pleasure
wine_bars_late.address: Rua de Ferreira Borges 86, 4050-253 Porto, Portugal
wine_bars_late.wine_program: Curated list of Portuguese and European small-producer wines with a knowledgeable sommelier and an attached wine shop
wine_bars_late.tip: Open late from the afternoon to 1am; the cave-like room with jazz and a charcuterie board is the spot for an unhurried late glass.
wine_bars_late.description: One of Porto's longest-running wine bars near Ribeira, with golden lighting, background jazz and a smart by-the-glass list run by a clued-in sommelier.

wine_bars_late.name: Wine Quay Bar
wine_bars_late.wine_program: Portuguese-focused by-the-glass list strong on Douro reds and whites, with cheese and charcuterie boards
wine_bars_late.tip: Grab a riverside table at dusk for the classic Ribeira-and-Gaia view; it is one of the best sunset wine perches in the city.
wine_bars_late.description: A cosy Ribeira wine bar on the old fishmongers' wall, pouring Portuguese wines with a privileged view across the Douro to the Gaia lodges.

wine_bars_late.name: Touriga Vinhos de Portugal
wine_bars_late.wine_program: Wines from the regions around Porto, Vinho Verde, Douro, Dao and Port, poured by the glass with regional small bites
wine_bars_late.tip: A focused stop to taste the four northern regions side by side; the Douro reds and Ports are the core of the list.
wine_bars_late.description: A Baixa wine bar and shop showcasing the wines of the regions around Porto, from Vinho Verde and Douro to Dao and Port.

wine_bars_late.name: Genuino
wine_bars_late.address: Rua de Miguel Bombarda 78, 4050-377 Porto, Portugal
wine_bars_late.wine_program: Natural and low-intervention wines by the glass with seasonal small plates, bar restaurant and shop in one
wine_bars_late.tip: Run by a warm Brazilian couple in the Bombarda gallery district; ask them to steer you through the natural Douro pours.
wine_bars_late.description: A relaxed natural-wine bar, kitchen and shop in Cedofeita's gallery quarter, with retro decor and a low-intervention list.

wine_bars_late.name: Vinhas d'Alho
wine_bars_late.wine_program: Portuguese wine list anchored in Douro reds and Ports, served with regional dishes on the riverfront
wine_bars_late.tip: A riverside table here pairs Douro wine with Porto cooking and the floodlit Dom Luis bridge.
wine_bars_late.description: A riverfront Ribeira wine bar and restaurant pouring Portuguese wines with regional plates beside the Douro.

wine_bars_late.name: theLAB
wine_bars_late.wine_program: Low-intervention Portuguese wines from small producers, plus vermouth and spirits, in a tasting room and shop
wine_bars_late.tip: Book a guided private tasting to walk through Portugal's regions and natural-wine scene with the team.
wine_bars_late.description: A natural-wine tasting room and shop on Rua do Bonjardim championing low-intervention Portuguese bottles from small independent growers.

listening_bars.name: Fiasco
listening_bars.address: Avenida de Rodrigues de Freitas 133, 4300-096 Porto, Portugal
listening_bars.wine_program: Wine and cocktails alongside a record store, four-in-one bar, shop and listening space
listening_bars.tip: Dig through the vinyl while you drink; it is one of the hippest late rooms in Porto and the wine list keeps pace.
listening_bars.description: A record-store-meets-bar in Bonfim where vinyl, wine and cocktails share the same room, open late into the night.

listening_bars.name: BOP
listening_bars.wine_program: Wine by the glass amid a collection of more than 2,500 records with communal players and headphones
listening_bars.tip: Borrow headphones and a record to play at your table; it is a true listening bar with a serious vinyl archive.
listening_bars.description: A vinyl listening bar near Bolhao with thousands of records, communal turntables and a wine-and-cocktail list for slow evenings.

listening_bars.name: Gito
listening_bars.address: Rua dos Martires da Liberdade 21, 4050-453 Porto, Portugal
listening_bars.wine_program: Tightly curated Portuguese natural wines by the glass in a tiny twenty-seat room
listening_bars.tip: Only twenty seats, so people spill onto the pavement; arrive early and let the owners pick the natural pours.
listening_bars.description: A tiny, music-loving natural-wine bar in the historic centre with an exciting glass list and a spill-onto-the-street crowd.

candle_lit.name: Capela Incomum
candle_lit.wine_program: Short, Douro and Minho focused Portuguese list with sparkling and Port, plus cheese and charcuterie
candle_lit.tip: Book the table inside the old chapel apse for the most atmospheric seat; Fado nights make it especially candlelit and hushed.
candle_lit.description: A wine bar set inside a deconsecrated chapel in Cedofeita, all candlelight and blues, with a short Douro-leaning Portuguese list.

candle_lit.name: Vinologia
candle_lit.address: Rua de Sao Joao 28, 4050-552 Porto, Portugal
candle_lit.wine_program: Around 200 Ports and Douro wines from small producers, poured in flights in a cosy candle-warm tasting room
candle_lit.tip: Sit at the back tables and ask for a vertical Port flight; the snug room is at its best after dark.
candle_lit.description: An intimate Ribeira tasting room with around 200 Ports and Douro wines from small producers, open late in a warm, low-lit space.

candle_lit.name: Gharb
candle_lit.address: Campo dos Martires da Patria 130, 4050-366 Porto, Portugal
candle_lit.wine_program: Natural-wine list paired with Arab-world flavours in a candle-lit, low-key room
candle_lit.tip: Pair the natural pours with the mezze-style plates; the dim, intimate room suits a slow late dinner.
candle_lit.description: A candle-lit natural-wine bar paying tribute to Arab-world aromas and flavours, with an adventurous low-intervention list.

lounges.name: Espaco Porto Cruz 360 Terrace Lounge
lounges.address: Largo Miguel Bombarda 23, 4400-222 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
lounges.wine_program: Port and Douro wine by the glass plus port cocktails on a rooftop lounge over the river
lounges.tip: Ride the lift to the 360 terrace at sunset for port cocktails over the Gaia lodges and Ribeira skyline.
lounges.description: A modern Port-culture centre on the Gaia waterfront whose rooftop 360 lounge serves Port, Douro wine and port cocktails with panoramic views.

lounges.name: AUGE Porto
lounges.wine_program: Wide selection of Port and Douro wines, port cocktails, spritzers and sparkling on a downtown rooftop
lounges.tip: Order the port cocktails; AUGE is one of the few rooftops that takes Port mixology seriously.
lounges.description: A panoramic rooftop lounge with a deep Port and Douro list and a menu of port cocktails over downtown Porto.

lounges.name: Dick's Bar at The Yeatman
lounges.address: Rua do Choupelo 88, 4400-088 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
lounges.wine_program: Extensive Portuguese wine and Port list from the hotel's renowned cellar, with a terrace over the river
lounges.tip: The terrace overlooks Porto and the Douro; the wine-hotel cellar means the by-the-glass options run deep.
lounges.description: The bar of the Yeatman wine hotel high on the Gaia hillside, with a deep Portuguese and Port list and a terrace facing the river.

fortified_specialists.name: Vinologia, La Maison des Porto
fortified_specialists.address: Rua de Sao Joao 28, 4050-552 Porto, Portugal
fortified_specialists.wine_program: Around 200 Ports from small independent producers, served as flights and by the glass
fortified_specialists.tip: This is the city's deepest small-grower Port list; ask for a vertical flight of a single house.
fortified_specialists.description: A dedicated Port specialist in Ribeira pouring around 200 Ports from small independent shippers, the place to go deep on the fortified style.

fortified_specialists.name: Graham's Vintage Room
fortified_specialists.address: Rua do Agro 141, 4400-281 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
fortified_specialists.wine_program: Premium Port tastings including aged tawnies and vintage Ports in a private tasting room
fortified_specialists.tip: Book the evening Vintage Room tasting for rare aged Ports with a guided tour of the 1890 lodge.
fortified_specialists.description: The premium tasting room of Graham's 1890 Lodge on the Gaia hill, pouring aged tawny and vintage Ports beside cellars of 1890s bottles.

fortified_specialists.name: Taylor's Port Cellars
fortified_specialists.address: Rua do Choupelo 250, 4400-088 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
fortified_specialists.wine_program: Self-guided cellar tour ending in tastings of Taylor's tawny, ruby and vintage Ports
fortified_specialists.tip: Finish in the peacock-dotted tasting garden; Taylor's has shipped Port since 1692 and stayed independent throughout.
fortified_specialists.description: The cellars of Taylor's, one of the oldest and only continuously independent Port houses, with tastings and a garden terrace over Porto.

fortified_specialists.name: Cockburn's Port Lodge
fortified_specialists.address: Rua Serpa Pinto 346, 4400-307 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
fortified_specialists.wine_program: Guided lodge and cooperage tour with premium Port tasting and pairing in the largest cellar in Gaia
fortified_specialists.tip: The premium tasting-and-pairing tour includes a cooperage walk-through; it is the biggest working Port cellar in Gaia.
fortified_specialists.description: Gaia's largest Port cellar, with guided tours through working cooperage and lodges ending in premium Port tastings.

fortified_specialists.name: Sandeman Cellars
fortified_specialists.address: Largo Miguel Bombarda 47, 4400-222 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
fortified_specialists.wine_program: Guided cellar tours ending in tastings of Sandeman ruby, tawny and old-tawny Ports, including a Don-caped museum
fortified_specialists.tip: The Old Tawnies tour pours four older tawnies; the black-caped Don logo is one of the river's landmarks.
fortified_specialists.description: The riverfront Sandeman cellars in Gaia, with a 17th and 18th-century bottle museum and guided tastings under the famous black-caped Don.

late_tastings.name: Prova late-evening flights
late_tastings.address: Rua de Ferreira Borges 86, 4050-253 Porto, Portugal
late_tastings.wine_program: Guided by-the-glass flights of Douro and Portuguese wine running into the early hours with a sommelier
late_tastings.tip: Come after dinner for a guided flight; open to 1am, it is one of the few places to taste seriously late in Porto.
late_tastings.description: Prova's late hours make it Porto's go-to for a sommelier-guided evening flight of Douro and Portuguese wine well after dinner.

late_tastings.name: Espaco Porto Cruz evening Port tasting
late_tastings.address: Largo Miguel Bombarda 23, 4400-222 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
late_tastings.wine_program: Port flights by the glass plus a virtual Douro flight experience, open into the evening on the riverfront
late_tastings.tip: The shop floor pours three-Port flights into the evening; combine with the rooftop lounge upstairs.
late_tastings.description: Evening Port tastings and a 360-degree virtual Douro flight on the Gaia waterfront, with a rooftop lounge to finish the night.

late_tastings.name: Capela Incomum Fado-and-wine evenings
late_tastings.wine_program: Guided Portuguese wine tastings with cheese and charcuterie on themed Fado and tasting nights
late_tastings.tip: Check the calendar for Fado nights, when the chapel hosts guided tastings with live song.
late_tastings.description: Themed evening tastings in a candle-lit former chapel, sometimes paired with live Fado, focused on Douro and Minho wines.

late_tastings.name: Vinologia evening Port flights
late_tastings.address: Rua de Sao Joao 28, 4050-552 Porto, Portugal
late_tastings.wine_program: Guided evening Port flights from a 200-strong small-grower list, open until midnight
late_tastings.tip: Late-evening flights here go beyond the big houses into tiny grower Ports rarely seen elsewhere.
late_tastings.description: Late guided Port flights in Ribeira drawing on a 200-bottle small-grower list, open to midnight for after-dinner tasting.

sparkling_rooms.name: Champanheria da Baixa
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: Specialist sparkling list of Portuguese espumante and French Champagne by the glass with finger food
sparkling_rooms.tip: The only dedicated bubbles bar in Porto; the terrace is the spot for a chilled flute, and there are heaters for winter nights.
sparkling_rooms.description: Porto's only dedicated sparkling-wine bar, pouring Portuguese espumante and French Champagne by the glass with aperitifs on a sheltered terrace.

sparkling_rooms.name: Raposeira sparkling cellars, Lamego
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: Traditional-method Portuguese sparkling tastings at the historic Raposeira espumante cellars
sparkling_rooms.tip: A short hop from Regua, the Raposeira cellars are the home of Portugal's best-known traditional-method sparkling; book the cellar tour.
sparkling_rooms.description: The historic Raposeira cellars near Lamego, home of Portugal's best-known traditional-method sparkling, with cellar tours and tastings.
